All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
BioKerosene
 
BlockedSurface
 
Bus
 
Car
 
CleanSurface
 
Dragon
 
Game
Controller class for the snowplow game.
Gravel
 
Graveler
 
Icebreaker
 
IcySurface
 
Inventory
Represents the inventory of a snowplow or player.
Lane
Represents a single lane on a road.
Logger
Utility class for logging method calls and returns with indentation.
Main
Entry point for the Snowplow Game Prototype.
Map
Represents the game map containing nodes, roads, and cars.
Node
Represents a junction or end-point in the map.
Player
Represents a player in the game.
PlowHead
Base class for all plow heads that can be attached to a snowplow.
Questioner
Utility class to ask yes/no questions via the console.
Resource
 
Road
Represents a road connecting two nodes.
Salt
 
Salter
 
Shop
Represents the equipment shop in the game.
Snowplow
Specialized vehicle for cleaning snow from lanes.
SnowySurface
 
Surface
 
Sweeper
 
Thrower
 
Vehicle
Absztrakt osztály a játékban szereplő járművek alapvető tulajdonságainak és viselkedésének leírására.
